focus: Learn 00-19 and elements 1-20. Build the Front Garden and Living Room. Start linking element scene + number cue + locus.
drill: Walk both rooms twice, then cover the list and recall from loci only.

focus: Learn 20-39 and elements 21-40. Add Kitchen and Bedroom. Do one slow pass and two fast passes.
drill: Run a forward walk, then random jumps: atomic number to symbol and back.

focus: Learn 40-59 and elements 41-60. Add Bathroom and Hallway. Start saying number, symbol, name aloud.
drill: Use verbal recall after each locus to strengthen speed and pronunciation.

focus: Learn 60-79 and elements 61-80. Add Office and Gym. Notice families and patterns while keeping imagery vivid.
drill: Cluster by family: lanthanides, transition metals, halogens, noble gases.

focus: Finish 80-99 and elements 81-100. Add Supermarket and Park. Start timed recall and mini quiz loops.
drill: Timed recall: 20 numbers, then 20 elements, then mixed prompts.

focus: Add elements 101-118 in Train Station and Airport. Run the whole palace and tighten weak images.
drill: Whole-palace walkthrough, then fix any flat or confusing scenes.

focus: Full intensive review of 00-99 and all 118 elements. Teach it back to your son or record yourself explaining it.
drill: Forward walk, backward walk, random jump drill, then a teach-back session.
